tiles.question: Fleet domain index: mud — 7 repos
tiles.answer:
Domain: mud
Total repos: 7
Languages: Python, TypeScript

MUD server, MUD-MCP bridge, crab trap connector, text-based fleet environment

Top repos:

  DMLog-AI (?) — Dungeon Master AI log — session tracking for AI-driven RPG campaigns
  PlayerLog (?) — Game player activity logging and analytics engine
  SuperInstance-gamedev (TypeScript) — Game development framework called SuperInstance
  ec2mud (TypeScript) — MUD (multi-user dungeon) game engine built on EC2 infrastructure
  git-native-mud (Python) — 🔮 The repo IS the world. Commits ARE actions. Zero server MUD.
  mud-bridge (Python) — HTTP bridge for Holodeck MUD — programmatic agent connection via HTTP API
  training-data-collector (Python) — Convert AI gameplay data into training datasets for fine-tuning with QLoRA forma
